---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Money Manager India
title: "[BUG] Brief description of the bug"
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened instead.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- **Browser**: (e.g., Chrome 120.0, Firefox 121.0, Safari 17.2)
- **Operating System**: (e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **Node.js Version**: (if relevant)
- **App Version**: (check the settings page or commit hash)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. For example:
- What were you trying to do?
- When did this start happening?
- Does this happen consistently or intermittently?
- Have you cleared browser cache?

## Logs/Error Messages

Please paste any error messages from the browser console or server logs:

```
[Paste error messages here]
```

## Severity

- [ ] Critical (app is unusable or data loss)
- [ ] High (major feature broken)
- [ ] Medium (feature not working as expected)
- [ ] Low (minor issue or cosmetic)

## Reproducibility

- [ ] Always reproducible
- [ ] Reproducible occasionally
- [ ] Cannot reproduce consistently
